infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Wasselni needs your location to find nearby drivers and calculate your ride price.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Wasselni needs your location to find nearby drivers and calculate your ride price.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Wasselni uses the camera for in-ride video calls with your driver.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Wasselni uses the microphone for in-ride voice and video calls.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Wasselni needs access to your photos to set a profile picture.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Wasselni needs your location to find nearby drivers and calculate your ride price.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Wasselni to use the camera for in-ride video calls.
plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Wasselni to use the microphone for in-ride calls.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Wasselni to choose a profile photo from your library.
